name: Caramel Strawberry Tortillas
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1/3 cup Whipping cream
2 tablespoons Granulated sugar
1/2 teaspoon Vanilla extract
1/4 cup Sour cream
- or plain yogurt
Place tortillas on a large baking sheet. Top with bananas. Combine brown butter. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes. Meanwhile, beat whipping cream with granulated sugar and vanilla until stiff peaks form. Fold in sour cream. Chill.
Serve tortillas warm, cutting each into quarters. Arrange 2 quarters on each dessert plate and top with sauce.
